## Testing

- [ ] Ran `pnpm check`
- [ ] Added screenshots or a short recording for visible web UI changes
- [ ] Confirmed the primary FAYE demo loop still works when this touches product behavior
- [ ] Confirmed this does not expose secrets or private Supabase keys

## Release impact

Release Please uses Conventional Commits from merged PRs to draft releases and changelog entries.

- [ ] User-facing product change
- [ ] Demo or pitch-support change
- [ ] Developer experience, CI, or documentation change
- [ ] Internal-only maintenance change

Suggested PR title style:

```text
feat(web): add scan-to-progress demo flow
fix(web): keep Eve panel readable on mobile
docs: capture hackathon product context
chore(ci): add verification workflow
```
